response.global_analysis: The video consists of spoken dialogue by Anya Melfissa regarding her 3D birthday live and new merchandise. No vocal music is present in this segment, only background instrumental music. I have prioritized transcribing and translating her speech, which is a mix of English and Japanese, while also capturing relevant on-screen text for the merchandise presentation. Timestamps are precisely aligned with her vocalizations.

subtitles.original: はぁ！
subtitles.english: Haa!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I celebrated,
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I celebrated,

subtitles.original: I celebrated my birthday with a lot of friends too this year.
subtitles.english: I celebrated my birthday with a lot of friends too this year.

subtitles.original: Yeah, a lot of the girls came to celebrate my birthday...
subtitles.english: Yeah, a lot of the girls came to celebrate my birthday...

subtitles.original: ...and also Detective Anya managed to solve that mission! Wow, she's got it!
subtitles.english: ...and also Detective Anya managed to solve that mission! Wow, she's got it!

subtitles.original: Detective Anya, did you guys like Detective Anya as well?
subtitles.english: Detective Anya, did you guys like Detective Anya as well?

subtitles.original: Detective Anya was pretty cool but not as cool as me!
subtitles.english: Detective Anya was pretty cool but not as cool as me!

subtitles.original: Oh my god and also, special guests! There were special guests!
subtitles.english: Oh my god and also, special guests! There were special guests!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to sing with Hatsune Miku! Hatsune Miku-chan!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to sing with Hatsune Miku! Hatsune Miku-chan!

subtitles.original: Oh my god she was really cute.
subtitles.english: Oh my god she was really cute.

subtitles.original: And also for the narration for my story part, Ueda Reina-san narrated.
subtitles.english: And also for the narration for my story part, Ueda Reina-san narrated.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, Ueda Reina-san also...
subtitles.english: Oh my god, Ueda Reina-san also...

subtitles.original: ナレーションね、ストーリーパートのナレーションもね
subtitles.english: As for the narration, the story part's narration as well,

subtitles.original: 上田麗奈さんが、えーやってくれました。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Ueda Reina-san, uh, did it for me. Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: ミクちゃんとも歌ったし、いや盛りだくさんでしたね、今年。
subtitles.english: I sang with Miku-chan too, it was really a lot this year.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, lots of wild things happening on this year's birthday live. How did you guys like it?
subtitles.english: Oh my god, lots of wild things happening on this year's birthday live. How did you guys like it?

subtitles.original: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh!
subtitles.english: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh!

subtitles.original: Yeah, I had a lot of fun!
subtitles.english: Yeah, I had a lot of fun!

subtitles.original: But, I would like to make an announcement this year. It's the usual.
subtitles.english: But, I would like to make an announcement this year. It's the usual.

subtitles.original: ここで告知があります。
subtitles.english: I have an announcement to make here.

subtitles.original: I have an announcement to make, let me make an announcement!
subtitles.english: I have an announcement to make, let me make an announcement!

subtitles.original: はい、こちら!
subtitles.english: Yes, this one!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, what is that? Who is that? Is that me? Yes, it is!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, what is that? Who is that? Is that me? Yes, it is!

subtitles.original: We're releasing some new merchandises too this year! What do we have?
subtitles.english: We're releasing some new merchandises too this year! What do we have?

subtitles.original: Let's take a look at them shall we? そしてえっと、
subtitles.english: Let's take a look at them shall we? And uh,

subtitles.original: 一つずつ見ていきましょう。まずは、こちらです！
subtitles.english: let's look at them one by one. First is this!

subtitles.original: Wow, it's a canvas art!
subtitles.english: Wow, it's a canvas art!

subtitles.original: Study Time with Anya! The Canvas Art.
subtitles.english: Study Time with Anya! The Canvas Art.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, this illustration is so cute! It's illustrated by Lunar-sensei.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, this illustration is so cute! It's illustrated by Lunar-sensei.

subtitles.original: Lunar先生に、イラストを書いていただきました。かわいい！
subtitles.english: Lunar-sensei illustrated this for me. Cute!

subtitles.original: The theme is, you know, literary girl. Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent!
subtitles.english: The theme is, you know, literary girl. Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent!

subtitles.original: 文学少女というテーマになっております。
subtitles.english: It has a literary girl theme.

subtitles.original: 次は、こちら！Study Time with Anya! The Notebook.
subtitles.english: Next is this! Study Time with Anya! The Notebook.

subtitles.original: This is, I think this is my first notebook!
subtitles.english: This is, I think this is my first notebook!

subtitles.original: I've never had a notebook as a merchandise before! Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: I've never had a notebook as a merchandise before! Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: Please use this lots for all your notes, for anything! いろいろメモしてね。
subtitles.english: Please use this lots for all your notes, for anything! Take lots of notes.

subtitles.original: オリジナルノートです。出ます！
subtitles.english: It's an original notebook. It's coming out!

subtitles.original: と、次は、こちら！It's a pen case! How cute is that?
subtitles.english: And next is this! It's a pen case! How cute is that?

subtitles.original: ペンポーチです！ペンポーチも初かな？
subtitles.english: It's a pen pouch! Is the pen pouch a first too?

subtitles.original: ノートも初だし、ペンポーチもなんと、えー初です！
subtitles.english: The notebook is a first, and the pen pouch too, uh, is a first!

subtitles.original: ぜひ一緒にね、あのノートと使ってください。
subtitles.english: Please use it together with that notebook.

subtitles.original: Use this along with the note, I think they would go really well together. Okay?
subtitles.english: Use this along with the note, I think they would go really well together. Okay?

subtitles.original: 次は、こちら！今年もボイスが出ます！
subtitles.english: Next is this! A voice pack is coming out this year too!

subtitles.original: そして今年もえーアーニャが台本を書かせていただいております！
subtitles.english: And this year too, uh, Anya wrote the script!

subtitles.original: I wrote the script as usual, as usual for every year.
subtitles.english: I wrote the script as usual, as usual for every year.

subtitles.original: I wrote the script for this situational voice, so please get it! Please get it!
subtitles.english: I wrote the script for this situational voice, so please get it! Please get it!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia, English and Japanese.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia, English and Japanese.

subtitles.original: ちなみにボイス自体は日本語になりますけど、
subtitles.english: By the way, the voice itself will be in Japanese, but

subtitles.original: えーと台本もついてついてきます。インドネシア語と英語と日本語の台本があります。
subtitles.english: uh, scripts are also included. There are scripts in Indonesian, English, and Japanese.

subtitles.original: ぜひ聞いてください！
subtitles.english: Please listen to it!

subtitles.original: そしてフルセット購入特典はこちら！Oh my god, limited edition has...
subtitles.english: And the set purchase bonus is here! Oh my god, limited edition has...

subtitles.original: ...what is that? A hand-signed autograph? Oh my god, it's the first for me!
subtitles.english: ...what is that? A hand-signed autograph? Oh my god, it's the first for me!

subtitles.original: Anya's first ever hand-signed autograph for limited edition! Please get them!
subtitles.english: Anya's first ever hand-signed autograph for limited edition! Please get them!

subtitles.original: なんと今年はサイン入りです！今年はサイン入りです。
subtitles.english: To my surprise, it's autographed this year! It's autographed this year.

subtitles.original: なんと、なんと、なんと！初、初ですね、
subtitles.english: Wow, wow, wow! It's a first, a first,

subtitles.original: アーニャが自らサインをして。
subtitles.english: Anya signing it herself.

subtitles.original: 初なのでぜひ皆さん、この機会で、ゲットしてください！
subtitles.english: It's a first so everyone, please take this opportunity and get it!

subtitles.original: Yeah, please get the limited edition! And for the standard edition...
subtitles.english: Yeah, please get the limited edition! And for the standard edition...

subtitles.original: ...it includes a foil-stamped replica autograph, so don't worry if you miss out on the limited edition! Yeah!
subtitles.english: ...it includes a foil-stamped replica autograph, so don't worry if you miss out on the limited edition! Yeah!

subtitles.original: と言うことで、グッズ紹介は以上です！
subtitles.english: So, that's all for the merchandise introduction!

subtitles.original: That's all for the merch!
subtitles.english: That's all for the merch!
